title: National Flooding Crisis
description: Historic rainfall floods major cities, displacing thousands.

C.title: Provide financial aid but no forced evacuations

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Mandatory evacuations save lives. Floodwaters rise faster than people expect.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Forced evacuations violate autonomy. People know their own risks.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: People underestimate danger. Floodwaters kill fast.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Then inform them — don’t drag them out of their homes.
